CustomField.formula: 7-((5 * ( FLOOR( ( TODAY() - DATE( 1900, 1, 8) ) / 7 ) ) + MIN( 5, MOD( TODAY() - DATE( 1900, 1, 8), 7 ) ) ) - (5 * ( FLOOR( ( Date_Status_changed_to_In_PSO_Review__c - DATE( 1900, 1, 8) ) / 7 ) ) + MIN( 5, MOD( Date_Status_changed_to_In_PSO_Review__c - DATE( 1900, 1, 8), 7 ) ) ))
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Days remaining to inform GR whether approved, green or escalated.
CustomField.label: Days remaining to inform GR
